meaning: adj.(法国)阿尔萨斯(Alsace) 的,阿尔萨斯人的n.阿尔萨斯人
examples: I'll get you an Alsatian pup for Christmas.
Hugel is a man given to spicy and expressive outbursts on the joys of Alsatian wines.
The 14th-century patrician house is decorated with handcrafted Alsatian furniture and French fabrics.
Alsatian wineries tend to be family run, intimate operations and production is almost always small lot and high quality.
